allow: PowerShell($ok = $false; for \($i=0; $i -lt 30; $i++\) { try { $tcp = New-Object Net.Sockets.TcpClient; $tcp.Connect\("127.0.0.1", 3306\); if \($tcp.Connected\) { $ok = $true; $tcp.Close\(\); break } } catch { Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500 } }; if \($ok\) { "MYSQL_READY" } else { "MYSQL_NOT_READY" })

PowerShell($ok = $false; for \($i=0; $i -lt 30; $i++\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8000/" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 2; if \($r.StatusCode -eq 200\) { $ok = $true; $r.Content; break } } catch { Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500 } }; if \(-not $ok\) { "BACKEND_NOT_READY" })

PowerShell($body = '{"title":"Tarea de prueba","description":"verificacion","status":"pendiente"}'; $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8000/tasks" -Method Post -ContentType "application/json" -Body $body; $r | ConvertTo-Json -Compress; "---"; \(Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8000/tasks"\) | ConvertTo-Json -Compress)

PowerShell($ok = $false; for \($i=0; $i -lt 30; $i++\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:5173/" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 2; if \($r.StatusCode -eq 200\) { $ok = $true; "FRONTEND_READY \(status $\($r.StatusCode\), $\($r.Content.Length\) bytes\)"; break } } catch { Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500 } }; if \(-not $ok\) { "FRONTEND_NOT_READY" })
